overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through the futuristic Night City at dusk. The character navigates neon-lit sidewalks, crosses busy intersections with futuristic vehicles, and passes under elevated walkways in a dense cyberpunk metropolis filled with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching a busy intersection, passing pedestrians and observing the cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking ahead, being followed by the camera

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure with rotating holographic advertisements on multiple levels
elevated yellow walkway crossing above the street with stair access
green street sign indicating Seaside Ave mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic city sidewalk at dusk, with a massive circular holographic tower dominating the center background. The character walks forward along the concrete path, passing the Seaside Avenue sign on the left while approaching a busy intersection. The yellow pedestrian overpass looms ahead, and sparse pedestrians share the walkway.

events.description: character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
camera pans around to survey the intersection, showing traffic and surrounding billboards

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at the crosswalk while observing futuristic traffic and looking around at the cityscape

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard displaying CIRRUS brand advertisement with bright lighting
yellow painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide intersection, stepping onto the yellow crosswalk stripes. As they cross the asphalt, futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection, and the camera pans to reveal the Cirrus brand billboard on the right. The circular holographic tower shifts to the left side of the frame as the character moves through the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated pedestrian bridge

events.description: character walks underneath the yellow elevated pedestrian overpass, entering a shaded area
passing an NCPD police car parked in a side alley entrance

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass structure, passing the police vehicle and continuing along the shaded sidewalk

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car parked in alley with blue emergency lights illuminated

entered.detail: underside of the yellow pedestrian bridge creating a covered walkway
white police vehicle with NCPD markings and glowing blue accents parked in building alcove

segments.scene_description: Moving under the yellow overpass structure, the scene becomes more enclosed and artificially lit. The character walks past an NCPD police car parked in a building alcove on the right, its emergency lights glowing blue. The circular holographic tower fades into the distance on the left as the character continues along the shaded concrete walkway.

events.description: entering a more crowded section with vibrant neon shop signs and increased pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: walking past various pedestrians and brightly lit storefronts in a busy commercial district with colorful neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and colorful outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: storefronts with bright neon signs in various colors including pink, blue, and yellow
illuminated vending machine with glowing interface on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up to a bustling commercial sidewalk lined with vibrant neon storefronts in pink, blue, and yellow. The character walks past increased pedestrian traffic, including a notable figure with green hair ahead. The NCPD police car and overpass are left behind as the scene focuses on the illuminated shopfronts and urban street life of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city sidewalk at dusk that transitions from an open intersection into a dense, neon-lit commercial district. It begins on a wide concrete path dominated by a massive circular holographic tower, moving past a Seaside Avenue sign toward a yellow pedestrian overpass. As the character steps onto the yellow crosswalk stripes of a busy intersection, the camera pans to reveal a Cirrus brand billboard while futuristic vehicles stream past. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed, shaded area beneath the overpass, passing a parked NCPD police car with glowing blue emergency lights as the holographic tower fades into the distance. Finally, the environment opens up into a bustling street lined with vibrant pink, blue, and yellow neon storefronts, moving through increased pedestrian traffic and past a figure with green hair.
